content.text:
[cron:investment-research-data-source-health-0935 09:35来福投研会-数据源健康巡检] 执行以下任务：
1. 进入 /Users/ling/.openclaw/workspace
2. 运行 python3 scripts/run_investment_research_data_source_health_probe.py --scope intraday
3. 运行 python3 scripts/generate_investment_research_data_source_health_broadcast.py --scope intraday
4. 读取 health probe json 和 health broadcast md
5. 如果状态是 healthy 或 offhours_guarded，则回复 NO_REPLY
6. 如果状态是 watch_guarded 或 degraded，则用中文简短汇报：状态、采样标的、最大价差分歧、触发项、broadcast 路径、probe 路径
7. 若状态为 degraded，明确写出建议立即临时会商
Current time: Tuesday, April 28th, 2026 - 1:35 PM (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-04-28 05:35 UTC

Use the message tool if you need to notify the user directly for the current chat. If you do not send directly, your final plain-text reply will be delivered automatically.

**状态：** degraded（降级）
**采样标的：** 688025.SH（杰普特）、688668.SH（鼎通科技）、300806.SZ（斯迪克）
**最大价差分歧：** 4.89%（688668 鼎通科技，腾讯 224.82 vs 新浪 235.81）
**触发项：** THS 本地实时行情不可用、数据源价差分歧 > 0.8%
**Broadcast 路径：** /Users/ling/.openclaw/workspace/research/reports/investment_research_data_source_health_broadcast_intraday_20260428.md
**Probe 路径：** /Users/ling/.openclaw/workspace/research/reports/investment_research_data_source_health_intraday_20260428.json
